sentences.arabic: نَظَّمَ الْحَيُّ سُوقًا خَيْرِيًّا لِمُسَاعَدَةِ الْأُسَرِ الْمُحْتَاجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kvart je organizovao dobrotvorno tržište za pomoć siromašnim porodicama.
sentences.translationEn: The neighborhood organized a charity market to help needy families.

sentences.translation: Stanovnici su donirali odjeću, hranu i knjige.
sentences.translationEn: Residents donated clothing, food, and books.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى النَّاسُ الْبَضَائِعَ بِأَسْعَارٍ رَمْزِيَّةٍ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su kupovali robu po veoma simboličnim cijenama.
sentences.translationEn: People bought goods at very symbolic prices.

sentences.arabic: جُمِعَتْ أَمْوَالٌ كَثِيرَةٌ وَوُزِّعَتْ عَلَى الْمُحْتَاجِينَ.
sentences.translation: Prikupljeno je mnogo novca i podijeljen je potrebnima.
sentences.translationEn: Much money was collected and distributed to those in need.
